title: Elevate your success with monday.com - Birmingham, UK - April 17th 2024
excerpt:

posts.author: thesaasypeople (The SaaSy People)
posts.cookedHtml:
Join us to simplify your work, boost sales, and create a more efficient, aligned team!

https___cdn.evbuc.com_images_711872819_2030346680343_1_original940×470 68.1 KB

On April 17th 2024 we’re hosting an exclusive event to showcase the very latest features of monday work management and monday CRM … From 25 floors above the Birmingham city skyline we’ll be sharing best practices, tips, tricks and live demos. Come along for an afternoon of learning, cocktails and networking.

Plus, a special offer awaits all attendees. Sound appealing?

Click here to get your ticket!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for sharing - we’re excited for this

posts.author: thesaasypeople (The SaaSy People)
posts.cookedHtml:
7 days to go and limited spots remaining! …

Tired of customer success headaches and/or sales pipeline chaos? Ditch the spreadsheets, clunky tools, reporting nightmares and endless email chains. It’s time for a real solution that will streamline your workflows and drive results.

Join us on April 17th in Birmingham City Centre and experience the power of monday. This exclusive event is your chance to see how monday can transform your operations and fuel your growth

Only a handful of spots remain! Don’t let your competition get ahead.

Secure your place and elevate your customer success and sales strategy:

Eventbrite

Elevate Your Success with monday.com

Join us to simplify your work, boost sales, and create a more efficient, aligned team!
